query:
-- Check how many octane_customer_links have empty/null MSISDN
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN msisdn IS NULL OR msisdn = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as empty_msisdn,
  SUM(CASE WHEN msisdn IS NOT NULL AND msisdn != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_msisdn
FROM octane_customer_links;
